## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated.
- [ ] Documentation updated when public behavior changes.
- [ ] `uv run black --check src tests scripts` passes.
- [ ] `uv run ruff check src tests scripts` passes.
- [ ] `uv run mypy` passes.
- [ ] `uv run pytest -q` passes.

## Risk

Describe compatibility, performance, security, or migration risks.
